notes: Verify the repository has a current README.
Verify at least one active automation or CI path exists.
Check that the Expo mobile app still declares an explicit SDK version and React Native dependency.
Check that the FastAPI bridge remains documented as the active backend path.
Check that the repo still separates mobile, mock-webhook, and phase2-backend responsibilities cleanly.
Check that local run instructions still mention the backend and mobile app startup sequence.
Check that LAP still presents itself as the agent control plane and not a standalone LLM proxy.
Check that MCP support remains documented and aligned with the current route surface.
Check that runtime templates remain registered through templates/manifest.json.
Check that the repository still keeps core gateway behavior under src/ai_gateway and preserves the documented architecture boundaries.
